subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the comprehension of all created things, befitteth the court of the glory of that Best-Beloved One, Who hath brought forth all the worlds [3.5s]... ...It is not permissible to solicit [Huquq]. If anyone offereth something of his own volition, thou mayest accept it, but it is not thine to demand anything from anyone
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراکات موجودات ساحت عز مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع عوالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
